title: silene nivalis
intro: Silene nivalis, also known as the snowdonia catchfly or white cockle, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Silene nivalis include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and mucolytic properties. Herbal preparations of Silene nivalis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
